title: PEAgent: analysis code for sequence-based modeling of plant epigenomes
description: Analysis code accompanying "Sequence-based modeling of plant epigenomes reveals cell-type-specific cis-regulatory grammar" (under review). Trains per-species chromatin-accessibility CNNs across soybean, maize and rice and reads out the regulatory grammar of plant genomes (lexicon, co-occurrence, synergy, cross-species transfer, ACR evolution, variant effect).
